review_text: Awesome staff and service. We had a cabin here for an evening while we got sorted to go and ride the Munda Biddi Trail. The park quiet and perfectly positioned to get to and from the airport. The staff were great and even stored our bike boxes for us while we were on the trip.

If I could give this place 0 stars I would. Stayed in a deluxe cabin. Arrived and the toilet was broken and wouldn’t flush. Cigarette butt on the deck and the shower knob also kept falling off. One night we also came back and there was a cockroach on the wall. Later in the trip the fly screen door broke and came off. Some of these problems we told maintenance about and they did nothing about it. Wi-fi also worked for about a day and then I was unable to connect as it said that all of the data had been used even though I only used it to send 1 text message. Horrible place. DO NOT RECOMMEND TO ANYONE!!!!!
A central location to Perth and suburbs  great staff and a relaxed atmosphere
Parking spots tight to get into but Staff are very friendly , park is clean and looked after.
Small spaces, camping is fine except the showers and toilets, its the worst i have seen during my 6 weeks of camping trip. Owner should be ashamed.

This park was the most expensive of our stays for a powered site. The park I would say was poorly maintained, from the grounds to the amenities. Disappointing to say the least. The location was ok, we tipped toward this park as it was pet friendly. It was expensive in comparison to other parks considering the condition of the grounds & facilities. We definitely wouldn’t stay here again.

Établissement assez ancien malgré un bon niveau de propreté. L’environnement n’est pas idéal, avec des travaux autour et la proximité immédiate de l’autoroute qui enlève un peu de charme. Pratique uniquement pour un arrêt rapide proche de l’aéroport, mais pas pour un séjour.

An awesome Caravan Park in metropolitan Perth. Had a fantastic stay in a 1 Bedroom Cabin. The cabin had all the facilities required for a great stay: fridge, gas stove top, microwave, cooking utensils, and was very clean. The wider camp had everything required: laundry, camp kitchen, pool. The park is surrounded by nature which makes it feel like you're in a rural area, despite being in metro Perth. And very very central to everything. Such a good place to stay and the staff were absolutely awesome and accommodating. Can't thank you all enough for an awesome stay.
On a tous transité un jour ici ! Sois au début de nos vacances ou la fin
Ok for stay with family

Wayne was lovely and our accommodation was great. Lovely camp kitchen with a couple ofBBQ’s, load of seating and of course a well maintained swimming pool to cool off.
Also close to the airport and unexpectedly our car rental.

We stayed here purely for convenience .
The Park is very tight,(see satellite imagery) The showers & toilets are stuck in the 70s & thats probably the last time any maintenance was ever done too. Showers flood, taps leaking, shower floors have tiles missing. The shower fans are disgusting and 1 doesn't work. (Guys they take like 5mins to change out (plug & play)!!

Site was a decent size, but very tight to reverse into with a garden bed directly in front and a palm tree in the middle of site. I would request a corner site next time.
Bathrooms are very old and in need of a refresh. Cleanliness was average.
We didnt have any problem with road noise, you could hear the occasional plane flying overhead but not enough to bother us.
Pool was small but lovely, clean and refreshing.
Location perfect to access the city and optus stadium, which suited the purpose of our visit.
No pool not much to here, other than a liquor store and peppers Cafe rooms very small no house keeping , but has good kitchen facilities if u get a queens studio other that not the best

The staff where super helpful 😁 and accommodating. It's the third time I've stayed there and it won't be the last.
Thank you

Had the most incredible service from Nick, the campsite manager.We have stayed in several parks in WA and this was by far the friendliest, most welcoming hospitality we have recieved. Excellent location, good facilities and plenty of showers.
Camping here was so nice, and the staff was so helpfull. Everyone was carefully and very friendly. It was a nice atmosphere and we can definitly recommend this place :)
Super helpful manager who kindly helped us out at his own expense. Extremely good service. Cannot thank them enough!

We contacted Perth Central Caravan Park after reading online recommendations. We stayed in a two bedroom cabin for the night before our flight and our van was parked in storage.

It was spacious, clean and everything we needed for our family! Perfect location close to the airport and shops.

Huge shoutout to the friendly staff who run and look after the park! Communication and friendliness doesn’t get better than this 🙌

Die Frau am Empfang war freundlich und man ist mit dem Bus innerhalb von 45min im Zentrum - gute Lage. Die offene Küche mit Grill, Mikrowelle, Herd und Kühlschrank war okey. Mehr Gutes gibt es nicht wirklich. Der Baum hat früh keinen Schatten gespendet und stand mitten auf unserer Camperside. Die Klos/Duschen sind Dreckig und stinken etwas. Da es einen Fernseher in der Küche gibt, sitzen dort jeden Abend Männer und schauen laut Fernsehen.

The Perth Central Caravan Park was ok the room was clean, but the service was not the greatest.

I booked a room but with different dates, I went to the reception twice (2 times) they did not help me to cancel nor change dates. So I have a booking of dates that I don't need.

Everywhere is clean and maintained, staff are very welcoming and it's in a peaceful location with not too much traffic noises. Also super affordable.
Would most definitely recommend and stay again 😁

Lovely people however shower had large mould patch in ceiling and bathroom sink dirty. Ceiling fans in bedroom was either barely on or too fast. Aircon is at front of cabin and doesn’t make it to the bedrooms. Beds were comfortable

There's black mould everywhere and even in the air con! The hot water system is terrible and very difficult to control. Not worth $270 a night for a family. I would never come back for this disgusting place.

Very insecure caravan park, without a gate in and out, no one guard at night watch you belong, also their cctv isnt working, someone hit and run, you will never get it, and gap on the fence to the bush land, anyone can come in, a RV plugged on the drive way for a night and fill water before going, not sure if they pay for it, big trees everywhere, lots of stuffs fall from it hit my RV like a stone hit, can't get a good sleep,if you got a slide out make sure you clean it before go, even its close to city still need to pay for full fare for public transport to city. It is also quite pricey Will never come back.
Very friendly and helpful staff.
The best

A nice enough park, reasonably quiet. Needs a good make over. Looking a little shabby. Pricing was all over the place. Somedays more expensive than others. Very nice lady at reception. Extremely helpful. Washing machines $4 per load, which is cheap. Large sites. Overall, we would stay here again as its probably the closest park to the city .

Very friendly and helpful people, nice clean park and amenities. Kids enjoyed their stay.
It was our 3rd caravan park we stayed at locally and it’ll be our first choice when returning back to Perth.
Was wrapped with this place! Stayed in a 2 bdrm unit, was spacious, clean and had everything we needed.

We didn’t stay but Nick helped us out when it was raining we did our washing/drying and had a quick wash before our flight out.
Beautiful service with a smile
Great place to stay close to twin

Room was fantastic, staff where responsive to any request.
We will visit again.
Proche de l'aéroport et des loueurs de véhicules.
Für eine Camper Rückgabe optimal. Der Service der Mitarbeiter war wirklich sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit.  Da unsere LPG Gasflasche nur etwas ausgefüllt werden musste, wurde keine Gebühr verlangt.

Great location but that's where it stops, amenities are dirty and showers are cold or no pressure with taps continuously running. When there was a loud what looked like permanent or semi permanent tenant who kept us up until 3am with some of the foulest language ive heard, we tried ringing the after hours number with it being turned off.

Stayed in 1 BDRM was clean ,close location to airport
Nestled by the swan river
I was checking in late so I had pin and access key for my room
Showers and toilets were in terrible condition

We stayed in caravan park then moved to a 2 bedroom. Place was spacious, spotless clean and overall very very nice.
Wini at the reception office is outstanding, helpful, professional and a pleasure.
Old caravan park, charging top rates, could only be explained by its location.

Rested for a last night after a week trip of South side of Western Australia, Easy and convenient place, near to Airport. After hour Late checked in, was easy to check in with the instructions sent to email.

The Caravan park is very close to Perth airport. There is also a Woolworths supermarket quite close as well as petrol Station and a Hungry Jack‘s. The staff was very friendly and helpful. We were staying in a Deluxe Cabin. It was clean and the Kirchen well equipped. Unfortunately, there were some shortcomings and the cabin was showing its age. For a standard cabin it would be ok but as a deluxe cabin it did not meet my expectations.

Merci pour cet accueil chaleureux, de grands emplacements pour les campings car... camping très bien entretenu, très bien équipé, sanitaires très propres. A proximité de la rivière Swan, bus 940 pour se rendre à Perth en 20 mns. Camping  calme bien qu''il soit à proximité de l'aéroport. Je recommande vivement

Emplacement très grand pour notre van, douche bien chaude , sanitaire propre . Calme malgré la proximité de l aéroport, bien situé. Très bon accueil  , le responsable toujours disponible. De plus le matin même de notre départ pour l aéroport,  notre van ne démarre pas ! Panne de batterie ou autre ? Il a tout fait pour nous aider à demarrer, câble etc. Mais impossible.  Il nous a aidé à tel au loueur pour organiser notre départ . Van laissé sur place et uber... merci beaucoup pour tout, la bonne humeur serviable... super gentil. Nous recommandons ce camping .

The location  was great.
Needs block  out curtains  in the main bedroom.
Horribly run down and filthy - caravan sites in disrepair- we left without staying. Nothing like website pictures.

Dump point is a sink with a plunger, shower heads are missing as are toilets seats the drains fill with water, hold toilet button for 5 seconds to flush, if it does, uneven sights half the park is permanents, dryer was dodgy all this and more for $68  @ night ...Free camping  would provide better..
Great location, very friendly staff!

Good City location and amenities we clean. Older dated park, , however our site 15 was riddled with exposed tree roots, which was dangerous and need attention. . Sap of trees meant vehicle needed a good clean up.
Older amenities which are regularly cleaned. Central to Belmont and Perth
Clean facilities.
Mostly a Caravan park with rooms available as well. Reasonable value for thd location.

I chose this bcos I still had a rental car with meIf you come with a car or a campervan or a caravan you could stay hereThe residence is old but I could live with it as long as it is cleanThe staff in the front desk was so friendly and kindYou can find restaurant and groceries nearby (by car)

Stayed in a 1 bedroom cabin. Staff were friendly and helpful. Cabin was clean and the air con was on, so it was a lovely surprise on arrival on a 35C day.
Quiet at night with highway and airport noise minimal. Love that the Swan River was across the road.
Overall good value for cost.

I try to call at the end of the day, I know that it can be close but somebody responded to me, take some information of my booking and said that I had to call tomorrow because it’s gonna close. Don’t responded if you want to close or don’t take any informations. Too bad for you, you lost a booking for one week, I take in an other place.

In our caravan from Qld. Our site was super hard to get into. No grass. Just soft dirt and a heap of tree roots all over the site. Thank god it didn't rain. One of the worst parks we have been in. Very disappointing to find this in Perth at $68 per night. Should have been paid to stay there.
Beautiful campsite to stay within the short distance from Perth CBD.

Keep driving, do not stay here! Don’t waste your money! It’s a run down dirty caravan park full off caravan residents not holidaymakers. It’s has a really unsafe feeling about when you stay here! Definitely do not bring families here! Caravan spots are so tiny and you struggle getting in and out.
I had a pet friendly cabin. Clean, comfortable and quiet. Booked very late notice and staff were very good to deal with.

Do not stay here! Absolutely not a family friendly place! It’s a trailer park not a caravan park for holiday makers! For the price you pay you can find so many actual amazing caravan parks in the area. The camp site is ridiculously hard to get your caravan in . Full of mozzies, cigarette butts all over the camp
site. The pool is so small.
Shady characters everywhere.
You get a code for the toilet block as it’s locked at night why?? never had this before in a caravan park? And it wasn’t even locked why? could not even give me an answer to this. 8 stars they reckon, i wouldn’t even give it 1 star. Don’t waste your money people. Go stay somewhere lovely where your children can run free safely having fun!
I didnt leave the park on a good note and i ended up abusing the manger( he’s an absolute joke. I’m not usually like that but he actually has him self convinced that is a caravan park, it’s not people it’s a trailer park. The photos they have on facebook isn’t what it’s really like! Be aware!!!
They obviously have people writing up fake reviews to bump up their trip adviser!
Be aware!

Stayed here for a week in November when I had surgery.  The staff went above and beyond during the entire stay, I highly recommend it. The park was nice and tidy and the rooms were clean and  comfortable, it felt like home and I didn't want to leave. 😊 Thankyou so much for everything, can't wait to come back.

My second time here. I don't know what it is about this place but it's a lovely place to stay. The managers are lovely, the campers are quiet, respectful and friendly.  You wouldn't know that you are in a city! It has a magic all of its own.
The ablution block is very clean, the sites aren't big, but big enough.
The pool is lovely.
It's a fabulous spot!

DO NOT STAY HERE. It’s the most disgusting, dirty dodgiest caravan park I’ve ever stayed at. The bathrooms are filthy and some of the shower heads are broken off. Homeless people walk through their at night and sit out the front and it has no security or boom gates. People live there in there caravans and tents it more so is a homeless shelter.There was people drinking at the camp kitchen half the night and couldn’t get to sleep till about 2 in the morning because people singing and playing music so loud. My sister felt so scared at night to go to the toilet or to even go to sleep. I would not leave your kids out of site. The photos on the Internet look good, but when you get there, it’s 100 times worse. Where we set our tent up the concrete pavers were cracked up and the mat was all ripped up and just dirt there. The only good thing about this place was it was near the airport.This place needs to shut down immediately and get bulldozed
Amazing caravan park, so close to city and public transport. All the team are super friendly and accomadating. I would recommend this park to everyone.

Extremely ordinary at best , seems to double as half way house and storage yard for the less fortunate , a glaring example  of the lack of quality caravan parks in Perth.|Dry dusty cramped small, the pool photo makes it look nice , most back yard pools are bigger and nicer than this one , the photos make it all look really nice , it ain’t
Very busy people come and go all the time. Good location for shops, water, petrol stations

If you want to stay in a dirty place this is the park for you overflowing bins from day before in 40 degree heat the smell was atrocious |The camp kitchen area needs a good clean dirty floors and amenities |I think maybe the manager should get out of the office area and have a good look round obviously no pride whatsoever as to how the park is run

Only 1 central aircon, rooms no aircon.
The office guy went missing for many hours. Emergency power is tied to the main power source, so went power goes down, who to call? LOL
No power on yesterday at 10:30 pm; the whole estate had no power, back only at 8:30 am, when the guy came to work.
Never going to use this park.

Power trip today at nite 10.30pm, not sure when power come back. the emergency button also not working probably link to main source power, never think about the bcp. In the afternoon staff went missing many hours during office hours and seems only 1 staff. Everything about this park inferior to holiday park. Please go see what holiday park just a few minutes wonder management it is.

So clean and everyone so friendly. Was just in for one night. Community kitchen very clean.
Thanks all for looking after us.

Location is good and the staff friendly.

The site is a bit cramped though but nice shade from the big trees.

Unfortunately there is no freezer in the kitchen even though it’s mentioned online and the facilities are a bit old and worn.

Wifi is limited to 500mb a day per site which is very poor if you ask me.

We stayed a Central Caravan Park 4 different times over 2 months. The location is perfect for the airport and industrial area (we had a lot of things we needed fixing).
Staff were amazing 🤩 Winnie and Alexi at reception helped us multiple times to extend our stay or adjust our booking, they were SO helpful!
Nick was amazing helping us store our caravan when we had to fly to Sydney.
The facilities might not be modern but they are well looked after and cleaned daily.
The pool was awesome and the camp kitchen was fantastic with an oven, fridge, cook top, microwave and TV.  Also a great place to chat with others and long term residents, all so friendly!
Also pet friendly .
We have been travelling for 6 months now and this is the first caravan park where it’s felt very homey, thanks team for all you do! 🥰🏕️

Cute & Kind
Pet friendly & Community style.
I will fondly refer to this adorable place as 'Gypsyland'. Such a friendly atmosphere. Many animal lovers. Staff are always around & so friendly. Beautiful little river/bush walk just a hop skip & a jump away.

Only downside is the turn off is off a hwy which can be challenging at certain times of day. But there is a 'back way' which is less stressful.

Campeggio in ottima posizione, per chi deve andare in aeroporto.  I servizi elencati nella descrizione ci sono tutti, però sono scadenti e assolutamente non adeguati al prezzo richiesto. Il campeggio è davvero troppo caro per il livello qualitativo che offre. I bagni erano vetusti e sporchi, con una zanzariera elettrica che non veniva pulita da molto tempo e a terra era pieno di insetti morti. La cucina era funzionante ma in pessimo stato e la sera a terra, sui tavoli e sui muri giravano scarafaggi. Abbiamo soggiornato in numerosi campeggi del Western Australia e questo è stato sicuramente il peggiore e con il prezzo più alto di tutti! Avendolo saputo prima, lo avremmo evitato.

We stayed for a work trip, the staff were super helpful with us organising last minute things to be posted to the park. The Cabin was large with great sized rooms and full kitchen and bathroom! Super clean, really friendly staff and great location close the the airport and city with good walking tracks along the river!
We stayed  in a cabin, nice size rooms, and beds are comfortable. Would stay again  if the need arises.
Good for fun

We stayed here for 5 nights and although the park is close to the airport and a 15 min drive to Perth CBD I feel there may be better places to stay.  The park has a very unsafe feel about it .  There are alot of long term residents that are there which makes things a bit dicey.  The sites are very very small and so hard to get vans in and out. So check the size of your van when you book.  It would be ok to stay here for a night only.|The staff are so friendly and nice here.  The amenities are very clean and lots of hot water and pressure.  There is a camp kitchen to be used.|Disappointing really.

I love central it’s called home to me I absolutly love it and will return when there is availability again the staff are brilliant and they are awesome always there if you ever need them definetly awesome place to stay will recommend it highly to anyone looking for accomodation thank you so much
good friendly staff, great location for those on  holidays.

Stayed here for 4 nights with my wife and pup was charged $220 per understandably I suppose but wanted to to extend a further 3 nights and paid for them at a reduced rate all good but in the end we didn’t need the extra nights due to work commitments asked for a refund as we would be leaving before the extra days were needed but was told we don’t do refunds pissed of big time they got me for $275 hope their happy rip of merchants I thought $880 for 4 days would make them happy but apparently they want more
The owner is incredibly kind. Great place to stay in Perth. Very peaceful and quiet location.
Fantastic caravan park, perfect location, and the staff were so friendly and accommodating!
First time at this site.. only clicked on it by chance. Happy me.

We were disappointed in the state of this caravan park old bakerlite power banks broken concrete slabs grass not mowed toilet seat loose water squinting out of hand basin tap our friends were also disappointed barry
It was a big place and clean houseThank u
due to my mums passing decided to get away. was bad experience. still waiting on refund which that was promised. rude

Booked through third party app. I managed to book wrong date, staff were super helpful for making alternative booking- even offered to help with a refund for wrong date and for a late check in, they were seconds away when pressing buzzer for assistance at office. Booked cabin- great cabin facilities, quiet, well kept.
Quiet location considering it's close to a busy road and there were many guests.
Did not use communal facilities (kitchen, bathroom), so cannot comment on those.
Would stay again.

Stayed for a week as visiting family in Perth.Had a very pleasant stay.Only 15 minute walk to train station to visit city,airport or freemantle and 15 mins walk to nearest woolworths,great transport links as i didnt have a car.|The bus stop was even nearer but only took cash on bus and i only had card.|The park staff were very helpful and polite,would stay again if I return to Perth.|Cabin was clean,spacious and had all the cooking facilities i needed.|Quiet site and it was a short walk to the river where there was a pleasant walk and cafe.Lots of nice birds,peaceful.
NICE.

Great place to stay and park up the Motorhome.
Very clean Toilets/showers.
Nice kitchen area with a pool in the background.

Big thankyou to Alexi.
Very helpful and very very easy to understand and talk with on phone while making enquiries and booking.
Just as helpful when I showed up to check in, even with trying to find a place to park my truck
Used for a short stay close to airport

Vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel denk in oplossingen.

Lekker zwembad !
I loved my showers with Curtin radio!! The bathroom is impeccably clean.  Bravo
Dodgy. Filthy. Unkept, not maintained.
The very best 👌
💥Magic💥

I had a very pleasant stay, people at the reception are amazing and they were always willing to help out.
Super recommended!

An amazing quiet place to relax close to the city the staff were quick to help in anyway. great atmosphere for my me partner 3 kids and a 7 week old we will deffinatly be returning and telling everyone we know cant wait to go back thank you to all the staff for there help your doing a great job
Sehr netter Service, trotz ausgebucht noch einen Notstellplatz mit Strom zum Übernachten bekommen. Sanitäranlagen sind aber sehr alt und  heruntergekommen. Zur Not OK.
Great customer service, friendly, gave use a discount, thank you again, alright powered site maybe a sweep or blow off before ppl use it but, alright space.

We stayed here a couple of weeks ago and our stay was amazing. The staff were extremely  friendly and caterer's to all our needs.  Early am check in and a late pm check out ,
There were 7 of us and the compassion shown was amazing .
Such a great location  5 min to airport , local buses available, and only 15 to 25 min drive from anywhere.
If we ever go back to WA I know where we will stay. Thank you we will be back someday .
Accueil splendide ! Une dame nous a accueilli comme des princes, l'endroit et propre et grand. J'ai adoré l'endroit et surtout l'accueil. Merci a elle

Great location. Only a few minutes drive from international airport. The room that we stayed in was clean,neat, and tidy. You've got everything needed. Stove, microwave, decent size of fridge, kettle, and toaster. You can find many sockets to plug in. It has a separate bathroom and toilet. The rooms are very spacious compared to many places that I've stayed in before. One room has an extra large king bed, while the other has three single beds. Suitable for a family with kids or groups.
Hot water and water pressure are 👍 good. I greatly recommended this place and will definitely come again.
The only thing you need to bring is a hair dryer, if it is your thing.
I love the many jacarandas view💜💜💜
The air conditioners do not work. Hot experience, in an unsatisfactory way.
Good alternative to hotel accommodation

Unit not up to standard. Lack d curtains on windows. Extremely difficult door to unlock …..
Perhaps caravaners have a better experience
Disappointing
Old school park but very welcoming and helpful. Great location not far by bus to central Perth. Very reasonable rates. Highly recommended.

The team were absolutely fantastic

We arrived at 1am to find out booking had been messed up and was booked for the following month

The team were wonderful and organised a last minute booking for us and made sure we had somewhere to stay for the night.

10/10 would recommend (but book directly through them)

I called this place my home, it's a shame we have leave. Staff are super friendly always there to help when you need it. I've met some amazing people and I'll never forget them.
Very close to everything, easy to get to transport.

I would definitely let my family and friends know this is the place camp for a few days.

Definitely need some things to do for small children besides a pool. All the  kids are super friendly and all the kids that my daughter has made friends with she's going to miss heaps.

Big shout out to Jim and nick top blokes there have helped me a lot.

It's not a goodbye its see you soon
#thankyouperthcentralcaravanpark

We stayed here for 4 nights in a 1 bedroom cabin. This is an older park which is well-maintained and  set well away from busy roads.  The cabin was very clean with all cooking facilities and plenty of room. Very friendly and helpful staff.|The laundry was small and could do with a bit of an improvement.|Park is in a good location to go exploring the many sites that are on offer. We were able to drive to the train station ( about 10 Minute drive ) to get into CBD.|Good value for money.
Very nice, but remember you get what you pay for!

perfect stay.
winni at the reception is very great.
Bunks not ideal for 70 year Olds! No internet, and nobody around in weekend. Photos on website make rooms look way better than they were.

I stayed in one of the cabins available at the park and my friends in a powered caravan site.
Straight off the bat service not great.  Forever to get there before 3pm to ensure someone would be around to collect key and arrival info. :-( we must made it.
Cabins are on the older/worn out side but functional enough with good TV.
Bathroom/Toilet a but tight on space.
Decent couch and kitchen area with everything I need.
Location is within a KM or two of train station and not far from airport so that's certainly a tick.  Pricing is very reasonable for a major capital city, but be prepared to do some manoeuvring if you own a bit caravan/motor home or camper trailer as the spacing for the caravan sites is very tight with narrow roads.
Great place to Stay and super location
Ridiculously small allocated sites. Only managed to get in to site with the assistance of fellow camper's moving their vans. Expensive for very  little. Never again.

Always so helpful. A small well run park with generous sized sites for your mobile home.  Super handy to the airport without the noise. Pub 5mins walk, servo handy. Kitchen with an oven a big plus. Great pool. River walks handy and shopping close by. Clean amenities with great water pressure in the shower. Recommend.
